name: testWaitScopeAnalyseSignal
title: testWaitScopeAnalyseSignal
syntax: long testWaitScopeAnalyseSignal (message aMessage, dword flags, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, ScopeBitMaskPolygon bitMaskPolygon, long domVoltageThreshold , long recVoltageThreshold, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 1
long testWaitScopeAnalyseSignal (char nodeName[], dword flags, ScopeBitMaskPolygon bitMaskPolygon, ScopeAnalyseResult analyzeResult, ScopeAnalyseHandle handle); // form 2
description: Form 1: Checks the bits of a CAN message against the defined bit mask.
Form 2: Checks the bits of FlexRay frames which are transmitted by one node against the defined bit mask.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: The CAN message to be analyzed.
0 = Analyze only frames in Key Slots1 = Analyze only frames of static segment2 = Analyze only frames in dynamic segment3 = Use all frame for analysis

parameters.name: msgFieldStart, msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: The start and end of the cutout to be fitted. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: maskPointCount
parameters.type: Count of the points in the mask-arrays

parameters.name: data_0_Mask
parameters.type: CAN: Voltage level in mV for dominant bits FlexRay: Voltage level in mV for Data0

parameters.name: data_1_Mask
parameters.type: CAN: Voltage level in mV for recessive bits FlexRay: Voltage level in mV for Data1

parameters.name: timeOffset
parameters.type: Relative position within bit in percent

parameters.name: domVoltageThreshold, recVoltageThreshold
parameters.description: The voltage levels in millivolt used from the bit parser for detecting dominant and recessive bits.

parameters.name: result
parameters.type: The result of the analysis.1 = pass0 = failed

parameters.name: framesWithDecodeFailure
parameters.type: Count of frames with decoding errors

parameters.name: framesWithMaskViolations
parameters.type: Count of frames with bit mask violations

parameters.name: bitFailureCount
parameters.type: Count of bits with mask violations

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
